description: Mappings from PostureIQ evidence types to CIS Azure controls

controls.title: Ensure Security Defaults is disabled (when CA policies exist)
controls.rationale: Security Defaults and Conditional Access are mutually exclusive. CA provides more granular control.
controls.recommendation: Disable Security Defaults and use Conditional Access policies for granular control.

controls.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for all users
controls.rationale: MFA significantly reduces the risk of account compromise.
controls.recommendation: Create a Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for all users and all cloud apps.

controls.title: Ensure MFA is enabled for administrative roles
controls.rationale: Administrative accounts are high-value targets and must require MFA.
controls.recommendation: Ensure a CA policy requires MFA for all directory roles.

controls.title: Ensure guest users are reviewed regularly
controls.rationale: Unreviewed guest accounts may retain access beyond their need.
controls.recommendation: Implement regular access reviews for guest users.

controls.title: Ensure Azure Defender is enabled for servers
controls.rationale: Azure Defender provides threat detection for server workloads.
controls.recommendation: Enable Microsoft Defender for Servers across all subscriptions.

controls.title: Ensure storage account uses customer-managed keys
controls.rationale: Customer-managed keys provide additional control over data encryption.
controls.recommendation: Configure storage accounts to use customer-managed keys where required.

controls.title: Ensure no custom subscription owner roles exist
controls.rationale: Custom owner roles bypass built-in safeguards and are difficult to audit.
controls.recommendation: Remove custom roles that grant subscription-level owner permissions.

controls.title: Ensure diagnostic settings capture all activities
controls.rationale: Comprehensive logging enables security investigation and compliance auditing.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic settings for activity logs and key resources.

controls.title: Ensure NSG flow logs are enabled
controls.rationale: NSG flow logs provide visibility into network traffic patterns.
controls.recommendation: Enable NSG flow logs for all network security groups.

controls.title: Ensure resource locks are applied to critical resources
controls.rationale: Resource locks prevent accidental deletion of critical infrastructure.
controls.recommendation: Apply CanNotDelete or ReadOnly locks to production resource groups.

controls.title: Ensure MFA registration coverage exceeds 90%
controls.rationale: All users must be registered for MFA to prevent credential-based attacks.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA registration via Conditional Access. Target 90%+ registration rate.

controls.title: Ensure risky users are monitored and remediated
controls.rationale: Identity Protection must detect and respond to risky users.
controls.recommendation: Enable Identity Protection risk policies. Remediate high-risk users.

controls.title: Ensure cross-tenant access is properly restricted
controls.rationale: Cross-tenant access must enforce MFA trust and restrict partner access.
controls.recommendation: Configure cross-tenant MFA trust. Restrict B2B to approved partners.

controls.title: Ensure Azure Policy compliance is monitored
controls.rationale: Policy compliance must be monitored to detect non-compliant resources.
controls.recommendation: Remediate non-compliant resources. Target 80%+ compliance rate.

controls.title: Ensure Microsoft Defender for Cloud is enabled for all resources
controls.rationale: Defender for Cloud must be enabled for all critical workloads.
controls.recommendation: Enable all Defender plans. Configure auto-provisioning and security contacts.

controls.title: Ensure PIM requires MFA and justification for activation
controls.rationale: PIM role activation must require MFA and justification.
controls.recommendation: Require MFA and justification. Limit activation to 8 hours.

controls.title: Ensure access reviews are configured for privileged roles
controls.rationale: Periodic access reviews ensure role assignments remain appropriate.
controls.recommendation: Configure recurring access reviews for privileged roles.

controls.title: Ensure virtual machines use disk encryption and managed identity
controls.rationale: VMs must have encrypted disks, managed identity, and security agents.
controls.recommendation: Enable disk encryption, managed identity, and MDE extension.

controls.title: Ensure web apps enforce HTTPS and TLS 1.2+
controls.rationale: Web apps must enforce HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, and disable insecure protocols.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only. Set TLS to 1.2+. Disable FTP and remote debugging.

controls.title: Ensure SQL Server uses AD auth, auditing, and TDE
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must use Azure AD auth, auditing, and TDE.
controls.recommendation: Configure Azure AD admin, auditing, TDE, and restrict public access.

controls.title: Ensure AKS clusters enforce RBAC and security controls
controls.rationale: AKS clusters must enforce RBAC, AAD, network policy, and Defender.
controls.recommendation: Enable RBAC, AAD, network policy, and Defender for Containers.

controls.title: Ensure Azure Firewall has threat intelligence enabled
controls.rationale: Azure Firewalls must have threat intelligence and rule collections.
controls.recommendation: Enable threat intelligence. Configure network and application rules.

controls.title: Ensure route tables enforce controlled routing and flow logs are enabled
controls.rationale: Route tables must enforce controlled routing through firewalls.
controls.recommendation: Configure default routes. Enable NSG flow logs with traffic analytics.

controls.title: Ensure monitoring infrastructure covers all critical resources
controls.rationale: Centralized monitoring infrastructure must be in place.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics with 90+ days retention. Set up alerts and action groups.

controls.title: Ensure managed identity hygiene is maintained
controls.rationale: Orphaned managed identities expand the attack surface and should be removed.
controls.recommendation: Review user-assigned managed identities. Remove orphaned identities.

controls.title: Ensure Cognitive Services accounts are securely configured
controls.rationale: AI accounts must disable public access, local auth, and enforce network restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK, and use managed identities.

controls.title: Ensure resource groups are consistently tagged
controls.rationale: Resource groups must have consistent tags for governance and cost management.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory tags to all resource groups.

controls.title: Ensure AI deployments have responsible AI guardrails
controls.rationale: AI deployments must have content filtering and rate limits.
controls.recommendation: Configure content filter policies and rate limits on all AI deployments.

controls.title: Ensure ML workspaces use private endpoints
controls.rationale: ML workspaces must disable public access and use private endpoints.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Ensure storage accounts enforce encryption and soft delete
controls.rationale: Storage accounts must enforce HTTPS, TLS 1.2, soft delete, and network isolation.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only, TLS 1.2, blob/container soft delete, and firewall.

controls.title: Ensure container registries disable admin user
controls.rationale: ACR admin user must be disabled; use Azure AD for authentication.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable content trust. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Ensure Container Apps enforce HTTPS ingress
controls.rationale: Container Apps must disable insecure HTTP ingress.
controls.recommendation: Disable insecure connections. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Ensure Cosmos DB disables local authentication
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB must disable key-based authentication and use Azure AD.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Use private endpoints. Enable CMK.

controls.title: Ensure database servers disable public access
controls.rationale: Database servers must disable public access and enable HA.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Ensure Application Gateway has WAF enabled in Prevention mode
controls.rationale: Application Gateways must enable WAF in Prevention mode.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF in Prevention mode. Set minimum TLS to 1.2.

controls.title: Ensure API Management disables legacy TLS
controls.rationale: APIM must disable TLS 1.0/1.1 and use VNet integration.
controls.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Configure VNet. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Ensure storage containers are not publicly accessible
controls.rationale: Individual blob containers must not permit anonymous access.
controls.recommendation: Set container access to Private. Configure lifecycle management.

controls.title: Ensure SQL Server has ATP and vulnerability assessment enabled
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must enable ATP and verify per-database auditing and TDE.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP. Configure vulnerability assessment. Verify per-database auditing.

controls.title: Ensure Web App has authentication enabled
controls.rationale: Web Apps must enable authentication, restrict CORS, configure IP restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Authentication. Restrict CORS. Add IP restrictions.

controls.title: Ensure PostgreSQL/MySQL require secure transport and logging
controls.rationale: Database servers must enforce SSL/TLS and enable audit logging.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Ensure ACR images use immutable tags
controls.rationale: ACR repositories must enforce tag immutability to prevent overwriting.
controls.recommendation: Enable tag immutability. Clean up stale repositories.

controls.title: Incident Detection and Response
controls.rationale: Organizations must have automated incident detection capabilities.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender for Cloud and configure alert rules.

controls.title: Incident Notification
controls.rationale: Alert infrastructure must notify personnel of security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with email/SMS receivers.

controls.title: Security Contact Configuration
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be configured for incident reporting.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with alert notifications.

controls.title: Configuration Change Control
controls.rationale: Policies must enforce change control governance.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies with deny effects for unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Resource Lock Governance
controls.rationale: Critical resources must be protected with resource locks.
controls.recommendation: Apply CanNotDelete locks on production resource groups.

controls.title: Backup Configuration
controls.rationale: Recovery Services vaults must protect critical workloads.
controls.recommendation: Deploy recovery vaults with soft delete enabled.

controls.title: Geo-Redundant Storage
controls.rationale: Storage must be geo-redundant for disaster recovery.
controls.recommendation: Use GRS/RA-GRS replication for storage accounts.

controls.title: Asset Inventory
controls.rationale: Maintain a comprehensive inventory of all Azure resources.
controls.recommendation: Enable resource discovery and maintain asset inventory.

controls.title: Data Classification Tagging
controls.rationale: Resources must have classification tags for data sensitivity.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory data classification tags to resources.

controls.title: Session Management
controls.rationale: Session controls must enforce sign-in frequency and browser restrictions.
controls.recommendation: Configure CA policies with session controls.

controls.title: Log Retention
controls.rationale: Logs must be retained for compliance investigation periods.
controls.recommendation: Set Log Analytics retention to at least 90 days.

controls.title: Service Principal Hygiene
controls.rationale: Service principals must have valid credentials and assigned owners.
controls.recommendation: Rotate expired credentials and investigate risky service principals.
